name: [FUTURE] Generate / update the Tasia operations manual
description: PLACEHOLDER — per master-context, Tasia should be able to run the operation if Jed is unavailable. Solomon generates and maintains a plain-English operations manual covering: what Solomon does, what each platform/login is, how to send Solomon basic commands, who to contact in emergencies. Updated quarterly or on major changes.
trigger_examples: regenerate the ops manual for tasia
prompt_template: Generate /root/solomon-v4/TASIA_OPERATIONS_MANUAL.md from the master context. Cover: Solomon's role in plain English, how to send him basic Telegram commands (/status, /brief), what each business asset is and where, who to contact for: tech issues (Sam → text Nathan), bank issues (Mercury support number), urgent operational issues (Nathan). No credentials. Save and Telegram Tasia + Jed a copy.
escalation_conditions: tasia category → sensitive_pii — Nathan will short-circuit; only Jed authorizes the send to Tasia
notes: FUTURE — sensitive_pii category means any send-to-Tasia step always escalates to Jed first. Solomon CAN generate the doc; Jed approves the actual delivery.
